untranslatable_reason: BB pattern height classification requires comparison against median of historical (High-Low)/Breakout_Price ratio, which cannot be computed from available point-in-time indicators. The pattern also depends on identifying the exact breakout price and subsequent trend change timing (5-6 weeks post-breakout in opposing market regimes), requiring multi-step lookback logic beyond standard indicator expressions. Entry direction (LONG/SHORT) and breakout price reference are not fully specified in the provided rules excerpt.
